## Checklist
- [ ] Follows entry format in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Description is in plain English
- [ ] Status badge is correct
- [ ] Placed in the right section
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under [Unreleased]
- [ ] Not a duplicate
